title: PNB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 545 Local Bank Officer Posts
description: Punjab National Bank (PNB) has officially released the notification for the recruitment of 545 Local Bank Officer Jobs. Candidates who have completed their Degree form any recognized university can apply for the PNB Notification 2026 . Here we have mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. The application process has started. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before t...
